options.content:
## Node Exporter Full — Placeholder

This is a placeholder dashboard. Replace with the real community dashboard:

**Download:** https://grafana.com/grafana/dashboards/1860

**Steps:**
1. Download the JSON from the URL above
2. Replace `/opt/monitoring/grafana/dashboards/node-exporter-full.json` on the monitoring VM
3. Or run the download script: `bash /opt/monitoring/grafana/dashboards/download-community-dashboards.sh`
4. Restart Grafana: `docker compose -f /opt/monitoring/docker-compose.yml restart grafana`
